ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_METER_12.3inch_UDS_PT_20210211
ddt:Target.Description:
[8]Feb 11th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Modified CF items, based on Rev10.
[7]Jan 27th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Modified CF items, based on Rev5 and Rev9.
[6]Oct 29th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified bit position of "Config.Data_$0200_#019_bit0_OpeningParameter_Twait_CF".
[5]Oct 26th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified CF/FFD/DM items, based on Rev3-5.
[4]Aug 24th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified items, based on Rev2.
[3]Oct 17th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified $F1A2 Request's name.
[2]Oct 15th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Replaced Config data, based on Rev N.
[1]Oct 4th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modiified Data name which had an error by space.
[N]Sep 30th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation. <ItemList: XXXX_UDS METER_LIST_N.xlsx>

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: The self-diagnosis for EPS doesn't work(00h)
